RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/mssql/crsp_selnext_tableidgen.tsql
RuleSet.Descr: Microsoft SQL Server Developer Edition Create Stored Procedure sp_selnext_tableidgen T-SQL Script
RuleSet.GenFile:
-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_selnext_tableidgen$ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ as declare @NextId smallint begin exec $sp_next_tableidgen$ @NextId output$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each passarg_CommaTableCol )$ select @NextId as NextId end go
quit

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_selnext_tableidgen$ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ as declare @NextId int begin exec $sp_next_tableidgen$ @NextId output$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each passarg_CommaTableCol )$ select @NextId as NextId end go
quit

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ use $lower DbSchemaName$ go
create proc $sp_selnext_tableidgen$ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ as declare @NextId bigint begin exec $sp_next_tableidgen$ @NextId output$reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each passarg_CommaTableCol )$ select @NextId as NextId end go
quit
